basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Young Professional Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Young Professional Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.details: Young Professional –II (YP-II): Master's Degree in Plant Breeding /Genetics and Plant Breeding/Seed Science & Technology/ Seed Technology/ Agriculture Botany with Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Sciences. Desirable: Experience on DUS testing/DUS testing of Rice/ DUS data recording and DUS data analysis of plant varieties. Young Professional –I (YP-I): B.sc. in Agricultural Sciences, Includes all Agriculture & allied Sciences, i.e Crop Science, Horticulture Science, NRM related disciplines from a recognized university with good academic record. Desirable: 1. Working Knowledge of Microsoft Word, Excel & Power Point. 2. Experience in Post Harvest handling of Crops Specially Seed Processing.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional posts at ICAR IARI is scheduled for 19 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: For Young Professional-II, a Master's degree in specific agricultural disciplines is required. For Young Professional-I, a Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Sciences or allied fields is necessary. Detailed qualifications are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Young Professional posts is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR IARI Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: The Young Professional positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held in Karnal, Haryana (Pincode: 132001). The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Young Professional posts at ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute.
